Interface IMosaicDatasetViewManager

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a mosaic dataset view manager.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("835E3230-A330-44EA-ADF7-3FF91697A7B3")]
public interface IMosaicDatasetViewManager

Methods

Clear()

Clears all associations between mosaic datasets and image views.
